member.name: T:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Authentication operations.

member.name: M:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(CentralKitchen.Application.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequest)
member.summary: Authenticates a user using email and password against Supabase Auth, returning access token and database profile details.
member.returns: Login response envelope with JWT AccessToken.

member.name: T:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.DashboardController
member.summary: Managers reporting statistics.

member.name: M:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.DashboardController.GetSummary
member.summary: Gets today's sales order count summary and low-stock warning indicators. Restricted to Managers.

member.name: T:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.InventoryController
member.summary: Kitchen inventory stock tracking.

member.name: M:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.InventoryController.GetInventory
member.summary: Gets all products stock levels. Accessible by Managers and Kitchen Staff.

member.name: M:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.InventoryController.UpdateInventory(System.Int32,CentralKitchen.Application.DTOs.Inventory.UpdateInventoryDto)
member.summary: Updates product stock levels manually. Restricted to Managers. Registers inventory log.

member.name: T:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.OrdersController
member.summary: Orders placement and fulfillment status transitions.

member.name: M:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.OrdersController.CreateOrder(CentralKitchen.Application.DTOs.Orders.CreateOrderDto)
member.summary: Submits a new franchise order. Restricted to Store Staff. Status automatically set to "created".

member.name: M:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.OrdersController.GetOrders(System.Nullable{CentralKitchen.Domain.Enums.OrderStatus},System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Gets orders list filtered by status and creation date. Store Staff see only their own store orders, Kitchen Staff and Managers see all.

member.name: M:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.OrdersController.GetOrderById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets detailed information for a single order, including order items and status history logs.

member.name: M:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.OrdersController.UpdateOrderStatus(System.Int32,CentralKitchen.Application.DTOs.Orders.UpdateOrderStatusDto)
member.summary: Patches order fulfillment status state transition. Enforces strict transitions rules: - created -> accepted (Kitchen Staff only) - accepted -> processing (Kitchen Staff only) - processing -> shipping (Kitchen Staff only) -> Triggers stock reduction in inventory and registers log. - shipping -> received (Store Staff of that store only) - created/accepted/processing -> cancelled (Manager or Kitchen Staff only, cancelReason required)

member.name: T:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.ProductsController
member.summary: Product management endpoints.

member.name: M:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.ProductsController.GetProducts(System.Nullable{CentralKitchen.Domain.Enums.ProductCategory},System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Gets lists of products with optional category and status filtering.

member.name: M:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.ProductsController.GetProductById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a specific product details.

member.name: M:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.ProductsController.CreateProduct(CentralKitchen.Application.DTOs.Products.CreateProductDto)
member.summary: Creates a new product. Automatically initializes the stock quantity to 0 in inventory.

member.name: M:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.ProductsController.UpdateProduct(System.Int32,CentralKitchen.Application.DTOs.Products.UpdateProductDto)
member.summary: Updates product information.

member.name: T:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.StoresController
member.summary: Store location management endpoints.

member.name: M:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.StoresController.GetStores
member.summary: Gets all stores in the franchise.

member.name: M:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.StoresController.GetStoreById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a store details by identifier.

member.name: M:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.StoresController.CreateStore(CentralKitchen.Application.DTOs.Stores.CreateStoreDto)
member.summary: Registers a new franchise store.

member.name: M:CentralKitchen.API.Controllers.StoresController.UpdateStore(System.Int32,CentralKitchen.Application.DTOs.Stores.UpdateStoreDto)
member.summary: Updates franchise store profile properties.
